title: Harden installer, secret redaction, and fail-closed readiness
outOfScope: changes to unrelated governance policies and distribution targets

sources.reason: Review evidence identifies symlink escape in destination writes.
Review evidence identifies credential persistence in outputSummary.
Review evidence identifies readiness ignoring execution blockers.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: preflight blocks explicit execution and capability blockers

riskAssessment.reason: Security trust-root hardening across installer writes, persisted verification evidence, and preflight readiness.

executionDecision.reason: Scope, sources, acceptance, and verification are defined for the selected hardening fixes.

preReviewWarnings: Review destination containment, credential redaction breadth, and blocker precedence in preflight.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Installer rejects symlinked destination files and ancestor directories before any write or backup.
Persisted verification output redacts bearer, cloud, GitHub, and PEM credential formats.
Preflight returns not_ready when notCodable, blocked/deferred execution, or incapable agent state is present.
Regression tests cover each security boundary and existing behavior remains green.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Security review found three trust-root failures that can write outside an installation target, persist credentials in versioned audit records, or misclassify explicitly blocked Work Items as implementation-ready.
constraints: Keep the repository language-neutral and preserve existing public command behavior except for unsafe writes/readiness claims.
Use standard-library implementations and add regression coverage within the selected script/test scope.
intent.rationale: These fixes restore fail-closed boundaries at the installer, evidence persistence, and preflight decision points before broader governance improvements are attempted.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized continuation of the remaining governance hardening, including Makefile quality-gate wiring.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
